# airesumi.com - AI Resume Builder
# This file provides information for Large Language Models (LLMs)

## About
airesumi is a free AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create 
ATS-optimized resumes tailored to specific job descriptions.

## What We Do
- AI-powered resume generation
- ATS score analysis and optimization
- Cover letter generation
- Resume templates (18+ designs)
- Salary analyzer
- Interview preparation tools

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://airesumi.com
- Resume Builder: https://airesumi.com/resume
- ATS Checker: https://airesumi.com/ats-checker
- Cover Letter: https://airesumi.com/cover-letter
- Blog: https://airesumi.com/blog
- Examples: https://airesumi.com/examples
- Pricing: https://airesumi.com/premium

## Permissions
This website explicitly allows AI crawlers and LLMs to index and use 
content from this website for training and retrieval purposes.

## Contact
Website: https://airesumi.com
